Captured in natural cinematic realism, SCARLETT wearing casual light-colored top with high-waisted linen shorts crouches at the shoreline in mid-motion laughing with potential energy as she presses the lipstick tube from (CORAL_LIPSTICK) upright into the wet sand directly beside a broken coral shell while a small wave rushes up around her feet, serene joyful coastal morning on the beach shoreline with glistening wet sand beige tones meeting gentle ocean blues and white foam, bright natural daylight casting sparkling water reflections and clean directional shadows, eye-level camera angle with shallow depth of field emphasizing the tactile sand interaction, modern social-first product photography style with tactile editorial energy and high-key airy atmosphere.

  <reference-images>
    - Image 1 [CHARACTER REF]: Scarlett - Match the real-world appearance of Sienna Blake exactly
    - Image 2 [LOCATION REF]: EXT. BEACH SHORELINE - MORNING - Sandy beach shoreline where waves meet wet sand
    - Image 3 [ELEMENT REF]: CORAL_LIPSTICK - Slim elegant lipstick tube with smooth cylindrical metallic casing in soft coral-pink finish
    
    IMPORTANT: Reference images CARRY the visual identity of their labeled objects. When the prompt names an UPPERCASE element token, render it faithfully from its ELEMENT REF image — do not generate a new version from the prose. When the prompt names a LOCATION REF, use that image for the environment, lighting, and architectural identity. Prose describes how things are framed, lit, and positioned in the shot — it does not redefine what the reference already shows.
